title: Edit card — validation & XSS
description: The Edit product page saves via PUT /api/products/:id. It does not validate input client-side (the backend 400 is swallowed, never shown per-field) and renders the description as raw HTML (stored XSS). Fix it without changing the API contract or adding runtime dependencies. Full bug + Definition of Done live in JIRA-0455 (jira MCP).
acceptance: Validate inputs client-side and show inline messages; do not submit an invalid form.
Surface the backend 400 validation errors next to the offending fields.
Escape/sanitize the description on render — no HTML injection / XSS.
Surface saving, saved, and error states.
Do not change the PUT /api/products/:id contract.
